name: Агитплакат диагональный конструктивизм — Сон Гоку
moment: Son Goku in Super Saiyan form, full figure, 78% of frame height, frozen mid-lunge in a hard diagonal attacking dash from lower-left to upper-right of the canvas (constructivist dynamic-diagonal composition, not the static wide-legged pedestal pose of the base recipe) — his body sharply canted along the diagonal axis, torso leaning into the dash, front leg driving forward low, back leg trailing extended, one arm cocked back sharp-edged with an open palm as if about to throw a strike, the other arm forward leading the lunge — spiky Super Saiyan hair rendered as bold flat golden-yellow flame-shapes swept back hard along the same diagonal as his motion, teal-green eyes, a flat cobalt-blue-and-orange gi (orange gi top with blue undershirt and wristbands, blue sash, orange gi trousers, blue boots) rendered as solid poster-flat color blocks, a jagged flat-yellow aura silhouette bursting off his entire body in sharp angular spikes that echo the diagonal thrust rather than a soft glow, small scattered speed-line shards trailing behind him along the diagonal reinforcing the dash. Canon markers to include clearly: spiky upswept golden Super Saiyan hair, teal-green Super Saiyan eyes, orange-and-blue gi with the blue undershirt visible at the collar and wrists, flat angular golden aura. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, joints bending in anatomically correct directions even in the dynamic lunge pose. Behind him a graphic sun-disc is pushed off-center into the upper-left corner of the frame (not centered behind the figure as in the base recipe), partially cropped by the canvas edge, its straight sunburst rays radiating outward across the whole background at the same 15-20 degree diagonal tilt as the figure's dash, rays rendered as alternating flat bands of golden-yellow and burnt-orange.
art_style: японский агитационный плакат 1930-40х, скрещённый с советским конструктивизмом (Родченко/Клуцис): плоские насыщенные заливки без градиентов, вся композиция построена по жёсткой диагонали 15-20 градусов — фигура, лучи солнца и текстовые плашки все наклонены в одном направлении, острые геометричные формы, лёгкая печатная зернистость и минимальное смещение цветных слоёв как на старой литографии, резкий ракурс снизу-сбоку усиливающий ощущение рывка
typography: Main phrase 'PUSH BEYOND LIMITS' is NOT set as a straight horizontal band like the base recipe — instead it is built as a stack of 3 stepped rectangular text-plates (one word per plate: PUSH / BEYOND / LIMITS), each plate tilted at the same 15-20 degree diagonal angle as the figure's dash, the plates cascading like ascending stairs from lower-left to upper-right across the upper-right two-thirds of the canvas, each plate a solid flat cobalt-blue rectangle with the word in heavy geometric propaganda-poster slab display face (blocky, high-contrast stroke, condensed) filled flat golden-yellow with a thin charcoal-black keyline (0.03x cap-height), cap-height 0.11x figure width per word, gap between stepped plates 0.15x cap-height, each word appears exactly once across the 3 plates. Secondary line 'SUPER SAIYAN RISING' set as a single slim diagonal plate tilted at the same angle, positioned along the lower-right edge of the canvas beneath the topmost text-plate step, matching slab weight at cap-height 0.05x figure width, fill flat cream-white with a thin cobalt-blue keyline, word gap 0.045x cap-height, each word appears exactly once. The vertical kanji column 悟空 (Goku, his given name) is placed inside the lower-left margin beside his trailing leg, outside the figure's silhouette, kept perfectly upright (vertical, not tilted with the diagonal composition) as a stable anchor point, rendered as a bold flat-crimson stamp-style column matching the poster's stencil character, glyph size 0.08x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly two glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: golden-yellow, cobalt blue, burnt orange, cream off-white, deep charcoal-black, crimson red accent for the kanji stamp

name: Агитплакат-заём — Леви Аккерман
moment: Levi Ackerman full figure, 75% of frame height, rigid formal parade stance directly facing the viewer, centered and perfectly symmetrical (not the wide-legged dynamic pedestal pose of the base recipe) — standing at strict attention on a low stone plinth, both boots together, shoulders squared, one arm bent across his chest holding the hilt of a drawn ODM (vertical maneuvering) blade upright against his shoulder, the other arm straight down at his side gripping the second blade point-down, his short black undercut hair, sharp narrow grey eyes with a flat neutral stern expression, the Survey Corps uniform rendered in flat poster-color blocks — white trousers, brown leather straps and ODM-gear harness crossing his torso and thighs in the canon geometric strap pattern, a tan jacket, and draped over his shoulders a flat-green Survey Corps cloak (canon color, rendered as solid flat green, NOT blue) bearing the blue-and-white Wings of Freedom emblem (two wings, one blue one white, mirrored) on its back and visible at his shoulder, cravat at his neck. Canon markers to include clearly: black undercut hairstyle, ODM gear straps across chest and thighs, green Survey Corps cloak with Wings of Freedom emblem, twin ODM blades. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs. Behind his head a small graphic sun-disc sits centered like a halo/nimbus, modest in scale (roughly 0.35x figure-width diameter, much smaller than the large sun-discs of the base recipe), rendered as a flat pale-gold disc with short straight sunburst rays, positioned to just clear the top text-banner below it.
art_style: японский агитационный плакат периода военного займа (war-bond poster) 1930-40х в переработке под аниме-целл: строгая симметричная геральдическая композиция в отличие от диагональных версий, плоские насыщенные заливки без градиентов, вся сцена заключена в декоративную прямоугольную рамку-бордюр, лёгкая печатная зернистость и минимальное смещение цветных слоёв как на старой литографии, фронтальный статичный ракурс на уровне глаз (не снизу)
typography: The entire print is enclosed by a strict rectangular border-frame set 0.04x canvas-width in from each edge, the frame a flat charcoal-black band 0.025x canvas-width thick decorated with a repeating small Wings-of-Freedom emblem motif stamped at regular intervals along all four sides (motif spacing 0.12x canvas-width, motif size 0.03x canvas-width), corner motifs slightly larger where the border turns. Main phrase 'HUMANITY'S STRONGEST' is set inside a solid horizontal banner-beam spanning the full inner width of the frame just below the top border (not overlapping the sun-disc rays as in the base recipe — the banner sits above the figure's head, sun-disc nimbus is smaller and positioned below the banner), banner fill flat forest-green matching the cloak, text in heavy geometric propaganda-poster slab display face (blocky, high-contrast stroke, condensed) filled flat cream-white with a thin charcoal-black keyline (0.03x cap-height); because the phrase is two words split by a possessive, it is set on a single line at cap-height 0.095x figure width to fit the full banner width without crowding, word gap 0.045x cap-height, each word appears exactly once. Secondary line 'SURVEY CORPS' is set inside a second, narrower solid horizontal banner-beam spanning the full inner width of the frame just above the bottom border (the low banner position is the key structural difference from the base recipe's stacked-below-main layout), banner fill flat charcoal-black, text in matching slab weight, cap-height 0.055x figure width, fill flat pale-gold, word gap 0.045x cap-height, each word appears exactly once. The vertical katakana column リヴァイ (Levi, his given name) is placed inside the lower-left margin between the figure's leg and the inner frame edge, outside the figure's silhouette, rendered as a bold flat pale-gold stamp-style column matching the poster's stencil character, glyph size 0.075x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly four glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: forest green, tan, cream off-white, charcoal-black, pale gold sun nimbus, cobalt-blue and white Wings-of-Freedom emblem accent
chroma_note: ВНИМАНИЕ: плащ Леви канонично зелёный (forest green), поэтому хромакей для сведения фона на этом принте — СИНИЙ (chroma: blue), а не зелёный.

name: Агитплакат рассвета на марше — Дэндзи
moment: Denji full figure, 80% of frame height, marching forward directly toward the viewer along the exact center vertical axis of the canvas (a straight-on advancing march, not the static wide stance of the base recipe), one leg striding forward hard so his boot appears to break the bottom frame edge, torso leaning slightly into the stride, both arms swung with force at his sides — a flat-grey chainsaw blade with a visible pull-cord housing bursts forward from his forehead between his shaggy dark-orange-brown hair, and a second chainsaw blade juts forward from the back of each of his hands/wrists (canon Chainsaw Man devil-hybrid form), his eyes rendered with small yellow devil-slit pupils, wearing his open dark-grey school-uniform-style jacket with a white shirt and loose red necktie beneath, black trousers. Canon markers to include clearly: forehead chainsaw blade with pull-cord housing, hand/wrist chainsaw blades on both hands, shaggy dark-orange hair, open dark uniform jacket with red necktie. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two legs, correct human anatomy (the chainsaw blades are attachments at the forehead and wrists, they do not replace or add extra limbs), no extra or duplicated limbs. Behind him, instead of a full sun-disc, only the upper HALF of a large sun-disc is visible, sitting low at the horizon line roughly 0.3x up from the bottom edge of the canvas, its flat straight body bisected by a hard horizon-line edge; below the horizon line the lower half of the disc is implied hidden behind flat silhouetted distant rooftops/rubble skyline in dark charcoal, above the horizon the sunburst rays fan outward in a full wide arc filling the entire upper background from left edge to right edge, rays converging low behind Denji's striding legs.
art_style: японский агитационный плакат 1930-40х в стилистике «марша рассвета»: плоские насыщенные заливки без градиентов, широкий веерный разлёт лучей от низкой линии горизонта заполняет весь верх кадра, лёгкая печатная зернистость и минимальное смещение цветных слоёв как на старой литографии, ракурс строго фронтальный на уровне груди зрителя, ощущение наступающей толпы/марша на зрителя
typography: Main phrase 'WAKE UP AND FIGHT' is set in a wide gentle ARC following the curved upper edge of the canvas (an arched banner curving from the upper-left corner, peaking above Denji's forehead-blade, down to the upper-right corner — distinct from the straight horizontal band of the base recipe), each letter individually rotated to sit tangent to the arc, heavy geometric propaganda-poster slab display face (blocky, high-contrast stroke, condensed), fill solid flat blood-orange with a thin cream-white keyline (0.03x cap-height), cap-height 0.10x figure width, word gap 0.05x cap-height along the arc, each word appears exactly once. Secondary line 'CHAINSAW DEVIL MARCH' is set as a straight horizontal band sitting directly along the horizon line at the sun-disc's bisecting edge (not stacked directly under the main line as in the base recipe — it is separated, low in the composition, integrated with the horizon), matching slab weight, cap-height 0.05x figure width, fill flat charcoal-black with a thin blood-orange keyline, word gap 0.045x cap-height, each word appears exactly once. The vertical katakana column デンジ (Denji, his given name) is placed inside the lower-right margin beside his trailing leg (mirrored side from the base recipe's lower-left placement, to balance the arc composition), outside the figure's silhouette, rendered as a bold flat blood-orange stamp-style column matching the poster's stencil character, glyph size 0.08x figure width, one clean unbroken column of exactly three glyphs, gap between glyphs 0.04x glyph height, appears exactly once. No other text anywhere on the print.
palette: blood-orange, golden-yellow, cream off-white, deep charcoal-black, dark rooftop-silhouette grey
